Haermaga has a message for you from the host of the festivities.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Haermaga has a message for you from the host of the festivities.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Haermaga congratulates you on behalf of the Adventurers' Guild before informing you that Gegeruju has expressed great interest in the dance that saved his faire. Speak with the wealthy merchant to see what he wants from you.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
